hero.title: SEAI Grants for Solar Panels
hero.subtitle: Take advantage of up to €2,100 in SEAI grants and 0% VAT on residential solar panel installations across Ireland.

details.title: How Much Can You Save?

highlights.desc: SEAI grant available for residential solar PV installations
highlights.title: Up to €2,100

highlights.desc: No VAT charged on residential solar panel installations in Ireland
highlights.title: 0% VAT

highlights.desc: BrightPeak Energy manages your full SEAI grant application process
highlights.title: We Handle Everything

highlights.desc: Grant approval typically takes 4-6 weeks with our streamlined process
highlights.title: Fast Turnaround

paragraphs: The Sustainable Energy Authority of Ireland (SEAI) provides generous grants to homeowners who install solar PV systems. The grant covers a significant portion of your installation costs, making solar energy more affordable than ever.

In addition to the SEAI grant, residential solar panel installations benefit from 0% VAT, further reducing the overall cost. Combined with energy savings of up to 70%, solar panels pay for themselves within a few years.
As SEAI Registered installers, BrightPeak Energy handles the entire grant application process on your behalf — so you can sit back and enjoy the savings.
